name: Elbmesh Update Architecture Manifest
title: Update the Elbmesh Architecture Manifest Contract
summary: Safely add or change Elbmesh manifest definitions for Resources, Components, Actions, Events, Reactions, Views, Queries, Policies, or External Operations.
description: Use this task when the architecture manifest or manifest-derived contract surface changes. Current Rust manifest code supports Resources, Components, Actions, Events, Reactions, Views, Queries, and External Operations; Policies and generated artifacts are target/future surfaces unless implemented in the local codebase.

outputs.title: Manifest contract changes
outputs.description: Rust manifest definitions, fixtures, or JSON contract changes.

outputs.title: Generated artifact or docs synchronization note

validations.title: Confirm manifest scope
criteria: The requested manifest change names the affected Resources, Components, Actions, Events, Reactions, Views, Queries, Policies, or External Operations.
Any requested Policy or generated-artifact change is checked against current source support before implementation claims it as done.

validations.title: Review manifest contract checks
passCriteria: Actions, Events, Reactions, and External Operations reference declared definitions.
Schema IDs and schema versions are preserved or intentionally changed with tests/docs.
Reaction graph remains acyclic for v1.
Generated docs, bindings, capabilities, or skills are updated or explicitly marked as needing regeneration.

blocks.markdown: Update the Elbmesh manifest contract for `{{ task.input.changeName }}`.

items: Read the manifest editor skill, GOAL, glossary, relevant ADRs, current manifest.rs, and architecture_manifest tests.
Identify whether the requested fields are implemented in current code or target/future contract only.
Update the smallest manifest definitions, fixtures, or tests needed for the slice.
Preserve schema IDs and versions unless the change explicitly requires a new version.
Run manifest validation tests and Rust quality gates when feasible.
Record generated binding, capability doc, RESOURCE_CAPABILITIES.md, resource-capabilities.json, or skill synchronization needs without claiming unavailable generation ran.

criteria.text: Manifest validation passes for the changed contract and fails with named errors for relevant invalid fixtures.
Docs/generated-artifact/skill synchronization is completed or explicitly recorded as not yet implemented or needing regeneration.
The final note distinguishes current implemented manifest checks from target/future checks.
